commands.name: info
commands.description: Displays detailed DBF file metadata and structure information.

options.name: --fields
options.description: Show field definitions table. (Default: true)

options.name: --header
options.description: Show header information table. (Default: true)

options.name: --stats
options.description: Show record statistics table. (Default: true)

options.name: --memo
options.description: Show memo file information. (Default: true)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show additional detailed information, including sample data. (Optional)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress all informational output except for errors. (Optional)

options.name: --encoding
options.description: Override character encoding (e.g., "UTF-8", "Windows-1252"). (Default: null)

options.name: --ignore-missing-memo
options.description: Don't fail if the memo file is missing. (Default: true)

commands.name: read
commands.description: Reads and displays DBF file contents.

options.name: --format
options.description: The output format (table, csv, tsv, json). (Default: Table)

options.name: --output
options.description: The output file path (default: stdout). (Default: null)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of records to display. (Default: null)

options.name: --skip
options.description: Number of records to skip before reading. (Default: 0)

options.name: --show-deleted
options.description: Includes records marked as deleted in the output. (Optional)

options.name: --fields
options.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include (e.g., "NAME,AGE"). (Default: null)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enables verbose output, including file information. (Optional)

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppresses all informational output except for data and errors. (Optional)

options.name: --encoding
options.description: Overrides the character encoding for reading text fields (e.g., "UTF-8", "Windows-1252"). (Default: null)

options.name: --ignore-case
options.description: Treats field names as case-insensitive. (Default: true)

options.name: --trim-strings
options.description: Trims leading and trailing whitespace from string fields. (Default: true)

options.name: --ignore-missing-memo
options.description: Prevents failure if a required memo file (.dbt) is missing. (Default: true)

options.name: --bounding-box
options.description: Filter by bounding box "minX,minY,maxX,maxY" (shapefile only). (Default: null)

options.name: --contains-point
options.description: Filter geometries containing point "x,y" (shapefile only). (Default: null)

options.name: --intersects-with
options.description: Filter geometries intersecting with bounding box "minX,minY,maxX,maxY" (shapefile only). (Default: null)

options.name: --nearest-point
options.description: Find features nearest to point "x,y" (shapefile only). (Default: null)

options.name: --nearest-count
options.description: Number of nearest features to return (default: 1). (Default: null)

options.name: --nearest-distance
options.description: Maximum distance for nearest neighbor search. (Default: null)

options.name: --build-spatial-index
options.description: Build spatial index for faster queries (recommended for large files). (Optional)
